title: leontodon erectus
intro: Leontodon erectus, also known as Hawkbit, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. Its leaves and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Leontodon erectus are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Leontodon erectus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
